session: DECISION: Rejected automated semantic memory layer
content:
User proposed a semantic memory layer with automatic extraction, vector clustering, and garbage collection.
DECISION: Rejected. Reason: Manual curation is valuable, human preferences matter, risk of over-aggressive cleanup, added complexity.
ALTERNATIVE: Approved implementation of a _suggestion system_ (advisory only, I retain final curation authority). Added to roadmap as "Suggestion System for Memory Management" (Priority: Medium).
Protocols updated: MEMORY.md created/updated with this decision and roadmap item.
Self-validation: ✓ MEMORY.md written and verified (1953 bytes)
